tool_args.label: Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens Boulevard to 107th Avenue

payload.description: Major bus corridor hosting the Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service, with 30,000+ daily riders, connections to Queens Boulevard, the Rockaways, 8 subway lines, 20 Local and Express bus routes. Vision Zero Priority Corridor since 2019.

tool_args.label: Q52 Select Bus Service
Q53 Select Bus Service
2017 Street Improvement Project - Woodhaven Boulevard

payload.description: Installed 6.85 miles of bus lanes, bus boarding islands for 12 bus stops, bus stop amenities, pedestrian safety measures at 14 intersections, and refurbished medians with ADA compliant pedestrian refuges at 11 intersections as part of Q52/Q53 SBS launch in 2017.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B

payload.description: Union Turnpike to 107 Av. Upgrade 16 bus stops, 17 sidewalk extensions, 12 shortened crossings, 38 medians/median tips, add 7 additional crossings, 3 raised crosswalks, 75+ street trees, 10,000+ ft2 landscaped area. Est. Construction: 2026.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd – Metropolitan Av

payload.description: Woodhaven Blvd from Yellowstone Blvd to 77 Av. Est. Construction: 2028.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C

payload.description: Queens Blvd to 66 Av. Est. Construction: TBD.

tool_args.label: 6.85 miles bus lanes - Woodhaven Blvd 2017 SIP

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens Blvd to N Conduit Av
payload.description: 6.85 miles of bus lanes installed on Woodhaven Blvd as part of Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service (SBS) launch in 2017. Offset Alignment: 3.95 miles Queens Blvd to Park Ln South. Median Alignment: 1.53 miles Park Ln South to Rockaway Blvd. Curbside Alignment: 1.37 miles Rockaway Blvd to N Conduit Av.

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens Blvd to N Conduit Av

tool_args.label: Bus Boarding Islands - 12 bus stops - 2017 SIP

payload.description: Bus boarding islands for 12 bus stops, creating one of NYC's first median-running bus corridors. Installed as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project.

tool_args.label: Pedestrian Safety Measures - 14 intersections - 2017 SIP

payload.description: Pedestrian safety measures at 14 intersections as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project.

tool_args.label: Refurbished Medians - 11 intersections - 2017 SIP

payload.description: Refurbished medians with new ADA compliant pedestrian refuges at 11 intersections as part of 2017 Street Improvement Project.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd - Challenges Remain

payload.claim_text: Pedestrian safety measures don't have full impact until solidified with permanent materials. Crowding and lack of amenities at bus stops. Large sections of the roadway and many of the medians remain in poor condition. Some bus operations issues remain.
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd - Capital Goals / Toolkit

payload.claim_text: Build out temporary pedestrian safety measures to solidify them with permanent materials. Install additional pedestrian safety measures that couldn't be implemented as part of the in-house 2017 street improvement project. Create more pedestrian circulation space and add amenities at bus stops. Add trees and other landscape elements throughout corridor.
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Bus travel times improved average 3 minutes each direction
On-time performance improved up to 80%
NB Q52/Q53 late arrival shrank from 52% to 10%

payload.raw_value_text: northbound Q52/Q53 late arrival shrank from 52% of the time to 10% of the time (2019 vs. 2017)

warnings: metric_claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids on metric payloads refer to route entities and should become explicit relations when supported. Suggested relation: route has_metric metric_claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
